title: Ya`aqob #3290
definition:
Jacob = "heel holder" or "supplanter"

 1) son of Isaac, grandson of Abraham, and father of the 12 patriarchs
    of the tribes of Israel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jacob = "heel holder" or "supplanter"

 1) son of Isaac, grandson of Abraham, and father of the 12 patriarchs
    of the tribes of Israel

    NASB:  a son of Isaac, also his desc.
